title: Rodeo Beach 🏖️ Marin City, California State, United States
content: Rodeo Beach is one of the best beaches in Marin City, long and relatively uncrowded. The beach is pet friendly and perfect for dogs. It's clean.

title: Rodeo Beach | Golden Gate National Parks Conservancy
content: Crissy Field by Michael Schwab. Schwab image of a long-billed shorebird walking on a beach with hills and clouds in the distance. # Rodeo Beach. Windswept, exhilarating, and covered with unique red and green pebbles, this beach is just three miles northwest of the Golden Gate Bridge. The cliff-top trail overlooking the island is one of the best pelican watching locations on the West Coast; as many as 1,200 of these great birds may settle on the rocks at one time. For the protection of the beach and the endangered tidewater goby—which burrows in the lagoon’s soft shoreline sediment—people and pets are not allowed in any part of Rodeo Lagoon. A hiker looks out at scenic view of the pacific coastline from the Coastal Trail in Marin Headlands on a bright sunny day. Span of the Golden Gate Bridge over the entrance to the Bay. Rodeo Valley. Span of the Golden Gate Bridge over the entrance to the Bay. Golden Gate National Parks Conservancy.
